subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-01 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! that I have come to Stuttgart, that I could meet with you. Praise be to God!
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @being a source of light; guidance, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
